title: File:MS_Westerdam_Getting_Underway.JPG
description: MS Westerdam getting underway from Half Moon Cay, Little San Salvador Island, Bahamas to Port Everglades, Fort Lauderdale, Florida, USA.  The Westerdam flies the Dutch flag and bears IMO number 9226891.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Stern view at sea; "WESTERDAM" + "ROTTERDAM" registry-port lettering visible on transom
